description: This file defines a Bootstrap component class 'Tab' for managing tabbed interfaces, including event handling, activation/deactivation of tabs, and integration with jQuery. It imports external modules for DOM manipulation, event handling, and utility functions.

classes.name: Tab
classes.description: A class extending BaseComponent to implement tabbed navigation functionality, including methods for showing, activating, deactivating tabs, handling keyboard navigation, and managing ARIA attributes.

methods.name: show
methods.description: Displays the tab associated with this instance, deactivating the currently active tab if any.

methods.name: _activate
methods.description: Activates a given tab element and its associated panel, updating classes and ARIA attributes.

methods.name: _deactivate
methods.description: Deactivates a given tab element and its associated panel, updating classes and ARIA attributes.

methods.name: _keydown
methods.description: Handles keyboard navigation for tabs, supporting arrow keys, Home, and End keys.

methods.name: _getChildren
methods.description: Retrieves inner tab elements within the parent container.

methods.name: _getActiveElem
methods.description: Finds the currently active tab element.

methods.name: _setInitialAttributes
methods.description: Sets initial ARIA and role attributes on tab elements and their panels.

methods.name: _setInitialAttributesOnChild
methods.description: Sets ARIA and role attributes on individual tab child elements.

methods.name: _setInitialAttributesOnTargetPanel
methods.description: Sets ARIA attributes on the tab panel associated with a tab.

methods.name: _toggleDropDown
methods.description: Handles toggling dropdown menus if the tab is part of a dropdown.

methods.name: _setAttributeIfNotExists
methods.description: Sets an attribute on an element if it does not already have it.

methods.name: _elemIsActive
methods.description: Checks if a tab element is active.

methods.name: _getInnerElement
methods.description: Retrieves the inner element (like .nav-link) from a tab element.

methods.name: _getOuterElement
methods.description: Retrieves the outer element (like .nav-item) from a tab element.

methods.name: jQueryInterface
methods.description: Enables jQuery plugin integration for the Tab component.
